subject: docs: wrap-up after CORS fix — removal path includes cors.ts revert
body:
Two doc tightenings caught by the session sweep:
- USER_ACTIONS.md removal path didn't include reverting lib/cors.ts dev-header
  allowlist. Future-owner following the list literally would leave orphaned
  CORS config for headers nothing sends anymore. Added the cors.ts revert and
  the matching health.test.ts assertion to step 3.
- SESSION_NOTES.md rewritten one commit too early — missed the CORS fix and
  the sun-sea-o source verification. Added a block covering both.

Tags: documentation, user-actions, session-notes, wrap-up
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: sun-sea-o-integration
Semver: patch
